---
name: Clarification request
about: Request targeted product/technical clarification before implementation
title: "[Clarification] <topic>"
labels: ["ai:intake", "ai:needs-clarification", "ai:needs-human-decision", "risk:low"]
assignees: []
---

## Context
What artifact/task triggered this clarification?

## Question(s)
List focused questions requiring decision.

## Why this matters
Explain implementation or planning impact if unresolved.

## Proposed options
1.
2.
3.

## Recommended option
State recommendation with rationale.

## Blocking impact
- [ ] Blocks planning
- [ ] Blocks implementation
- [ ] Non-blocking but time-sensitive

## Label checklist
- Keep `ai:needs-clarification` until answered.
- Use `ai:blocked` only if active delivery cannot proceed.
- Add relevant `type:*` and `risk:*` labels.
